tool.name: read_tool_doc
tool.description:
Read the full schema (with examples and details) for a single tool.
The system prompt's tools listing is rendered in compact mode by default — examples and details are stripped to save ~14K tokens per LLM call. When you need the full reference for a specific tool (worked examples, edge cases, parameter details), call this tool with its name.
This is a one-off lookup — the full schema is NOT added to your permanent context. If you need it again later, call read_tool_doc again.

parameter.name: tool_name
parameter.description: Name of the tool to look up (e.g., "create_vulnerability_report", "msf_execute", "browser_action"). Must match exactly an entry in the compact tools listing in your system prompt.

returns.description: Success flag, tool_name, full schema string, and a reminder that the read is one-off.
